calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Irrevocable Trusts; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Christina Gallagher Nelson for Vera Orvelian.

Ms. Nelson presented oral argument to support her position, spoke of the settlement agreement in the civil matter, stated that modification of the irrevocable Trust was not done in the civil action, that all Parties consented to the petition, that all Parties were adequately represented, and explained that the Mason Street property was given to George in exchange for his interest in the Family business. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
